title: Iran prepares law to manage Strait of Hormuz — tolls, permits, 20% cargo confiscation for violators
snippet: Dawn reporting on Iran's draft Hormuz navigation law. Tolls for safety, maritime guidance, environmental protection. Revenues to defense, livelihoods, reconstruction. Ships disobeying rules face seizure and 20% cargo confiscation. Law claims to respect international law and neighboring countries' rights.
tag_reason: Additional source on Hormuz navigation law with revenue/enforcement details not in Press TV report
